sections.title: Saved friends for Split Bill
sections.description: Save the people you split bills with often, then add them back in one tap the next time you need them.

sections.title: Split items equally or by quantity
sections.description: Shared items are more flexible now. You can keep a simple equal split or assign quantities per person when someone ordered more than the others.

sections.title: Compare scanned receipts while editing
sections.description: Keep the original receipt visible while you review scanned items, fees, and totals, so it is easier to double-check the details.

sections.title: Smarter receipt scanning
sections.description: Receipt scan accuracy keeps getting better, so both Add Expense via Scan and Split Bill Scan do a better job pulling the right details from your receipt.

sections.title: Start Split Bill without scanning first
sections.description: Want to build the receipt manually? You can now jump straight into the editor without taking a photo first.

sections.title: Release Notes in Settings
sections.description: Open Release Notes from Settings to revisit the latest update and browse older versions anytime.
